headline: 暑期档新片热度攀升，经典IP回归
headlineEn: Summer Box Office Heats Up with Classic IP Returns
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：本周无新片上映，但《后室》《痴迷》等片持续领跑热搜。《安昂传奇》《蜘蛛侠》新作备受期待。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but 'The Backrooms' and 'Obsession' top trending. Upcoming 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' and 'Spider-Man: Fresh Start' generate buzz.

industryHighlights.text: 《海洋奇缘：启航》本周热度上升
industryHighlights.en: 'Moana: Set Sail' gains momentum this week

industryHighlights.text: 《末日地堡》科幻题材持续吸睛
《鬼玩人：炼狱》经典恐怖系列新作
industryHighlights.en: 'Evil Dead: Purgatory' new entry in classic horror franchise
